introSection: Cobra is a steel roller coaster currently located at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK. It is a Gerstlauer Bobsled 450/4, which has a layout very similar to the Bobsled 480/4 by the same manufacturer, however the Bobsled 450/4 lacks the final helix found on the Bobsled 480/4.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Cobra opened on the 18th of March 2006.

The ride closed on 7 September 2025. It is expected to reopen in May 2026 as Raven and be part of the new Valgard - Realm of the Vikings area.

fullText:
Cobra is a steel roller coaster currently located at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK. It is a Gerstlauer Bobsled 450/4, which has a layout very similar to the Bobsled 480/4 by the same manufacturer, however the Bobsled 450/4 lacks the final helix found on the Bobsled 480/4.

Cobra opened on the 18th of March 2006.

The ride closed on 7 September 2025. It is expected to reopen in May 2026 as Raven and be part of the new Valgard - Realm of the Vikings area.
